iclr2026.reason: The official OpenReview records have current titles while the Paper Copilot snapshot contains earlier or alternate title revisions; counts are nearly identical.
examples: A Tale of Two Smoothness Notions: Adaptive Optimizers and Non-Euclidean Descent

siggraphasia2020.reason: Paper Copilot contains truncated or alternate SIGGRAPH Asia 2020 titles while the official ACM SIGGRAPH History Archives and Crossref records contain complete titles.
